overall.description: A smooth drone-camera fly-around of the Montreal Olympic Stadium in a flight simulator game, showcasing the distinctive curved glass facade and iconic inclined tower against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The scene is devoid of people and vehicles, emphasizing the architectural forms and expansive paved plaza surrounding the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium exterior plaza - side facade approach

agents.ego_description: flying drone camera smoothly along the stadium's curved glass exterior wall, maintaining consistent altitude

entered.detail: large curved building with dark glass panels and concrete base featuring vertical support structures
expansive light-colored concrete plaza surrounding the stadium
multi-story residential towers visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth drone flight alongside the Montreal Olympic Stadium's curved glass facade. The massive structure dominates the left side of the frame while the expansive paved plaza stretches out below. Distant apartment buildings are visible on the horizon under a bright blue sky with scattered cumulus clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium rear corner with auxiliary service buildings

events.description: camera rounds the stadium corner revealing small auxiliary buildings behind the main structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the stadium corner toward the rear, revealing auxiliary structures

entered.detail: low beige concrete buildings with flat roofs situated behind the main stadium

segments.scene_description: As the drone rounds the corner of the stadium, the view transitions to reveal small auxiliary service buildings situated behind the main structure. The stadium facade recedes to the left while the beige service buildings come into prominence in the center of the frame, all set against the same expansive paved plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium inclined tower side with iconic roof structure

events.description: inclined tower of the stadium comes into prominent view against the sky

agents.ego_description: circling to view the iconic inclined tower and cable-supported roof structure from multiple angles

entered.detail: tall white concrete tower leaning at an angle with observation deck at top
cable support system connecting the inclined tower to the stadium roof
green deciduous trees visible in the distance beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the iconic inclined tower as the drone moves toward the rear of the stadium. The distinctive white tower leans dramatically against the blue sky, with its cable support system visible connecting to the curved roof. The camera continues past the tower, showing the full scale of the stadium structure before trees appear on the distant right horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight that begins alongside the curved glass facade of the Montreal Olympic Stadium and sweeps around to reveal its iconic inclined tower. It begins by gliding parallel to the massive glass structure, with an expansive paved plaza stretching below toward distant apartment buildings under a bright blue sky. As the camera rounds the corner of the stadium, the facade recedes to the left to bring small, beige auxiliary service buildings into prominence. The scene then shifts toward the rear of the complex, where the distinctive white tower emerges, leaning dramatically against the sky with its cable support system visible. Finally, the camera moves past the tower to showcase the full scale of the architecture before trees appear on the distant right horizon.
